parameters.subject: =🚨 n8n Workflow Error: {{ $json.workflowName }}

parameters.content:
## Triggers when workflows Fail

Make sure you go to you production workflow > settings and select this workflow for Error Workflow

Note- only production failures are caught by Error workflows

## GPT Powered AI Analysis

* Gathers information about failures
* Work on all type of Failures

## Multi Notification System
* Add as many as you need
* Beautiful Email notifications with Error Breakdown

## ⚡ How This Error Monitoring Workflow Works

### 1️⃣ Set as Your Error Handler  
Go to any production workflow → Settings → **Error Workflow** →  
Select this workflow.  
(Only production errors are captured.)

### 2️⃣ AI Error Diagnosis  
The AI Agent analyzes:  
• Error message  
• Stack trace  
• Failed node (name + type)  
• Workflow name  
• Execution ID  
• Timestamp  
It produces a clear root-cause + 3 recommended fixes.

### 3️⃣ Structured Output  
The Set node formats everything into a clean JSON payload for notifications.

### 4️⃣ Multi-Channel Alerts  
• 📩 Gmail sends a full HTML error report  
• 📱 Telegram sends a quick AI summary  
You can add Slack, Discord, SMS, or ClickUp notifications easily.

### 5️⃣ Faster Fixes  
Every alert includes:  
Root cause → Impact → Solutions → Prevention → Urgency level.  
Perfect for production reliability.

---

**Author: Sandeep Patharkar**  
**Skool:** www.skool.com/aic-plus  
**LinkedIn:** www.linkedin.com/in/sandeeppatharkar
